Sorry to keep you waiting!"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bWelcome to the world of Pok\u00E9mon."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bMy name is Oak."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bPeople call me the Pok\u00E9mon Professor."]},{"c":118,"i":0,"p":["Help Choices"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bIf you need help, I am certainly capable of giving it."]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Controls","Adventure","No info are about to enter a world\\nwhere "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["you will embark on a grand\\nadventure of your very "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["own."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\u003Cac\u003E\\c[0]\\l[5]Speak to people and check things\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["wherever you go, be it in towns,\\nroads or caves.\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Gather information and hints from\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["every possible source."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\u003Cac\u003E\\c[0]\\l[3]New paths will open to you when\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["you help people in need, overcome\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["challenges, and solve mysteries."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\u003Cac\u003E\\c[0]\\l[7]At times, you will be challenged\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["by others to a battle.\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["At other times, wild creatures\\nmay stand in your way.\\n\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["By overcoming such hurdles,\\nyou will gain great power."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\u003Cac\u003E\\c[0]\\l[2]However, your adventure is not\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["solely about becoming powerful."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\u003Cac\u003E\\c[0]\\l[7]On your travels, we hope that\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["you will meet countless people\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["and, through them, achieve\\npersonal growth.\\n\\n"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["This is the most important\\nobjective of this adventure."]},{"c":232,"i":1,"p":[4,10,0,0,0,0,100,100,0,0]},{"c":106,"i":1,"p":[10]},{"c":235,"i":1,"p":[4]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbToneChangeAll("]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" Tone.new(0, 0, 0, "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["them."]},{"c":106,"i":0,"p":[5]},{"c":232,"i":0,"p":[3,10,1,0,256,220,100,100,0,0]},{"c":106,"i":0,"p":[10]},{"c":235,"i":0,"p":[3]},{"c":231,"i":0,"p":[3,"introOak",1,0,256,172,100,100,0,0]},{"c":232,"i":0,"p":[3,10,1,0,256,172,100,100,255,0]},{"c":106,"i":0,"p":[10]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bBut we don\u0027t know everything about Pok\u00E9mon yet."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bThere are still many mysteries to solve."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bThat\u0027s why I study Pok\u00E9mon every you a boy or a girl?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Boy","Girl"],0]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Boy"]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["Initializes player character 1."]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["[\u0022pbChangePlayer\u0022 takes a value from 1 upwards. Let\u0027s go!"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bEnjoy the Starter Kit.
